title: Tax Preparation Assistance * Hispanic/Latino Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Financial Wellness > Tax Preparation Assistance * Hispanic/Latino Community 4 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Hispanic/Latino Community Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CONSEJO HISPANO ECONOMIC EMPOWERMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides Volunteer Income Tax Assistance (VITA) and help with Individual Taxpayer Identification Number (ITIN). Host financial literacy workshops for youth and their families, Decisiones De Dinero, teaching basic money management skills including earning, saving, budgeting, credit/debit, and taxes. 565 12th Street Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Unrestricted with a focus on serving the Latinx/Hispanic Community Hours: Individual Taxpayer Identification Number (ITIN): Monday-Friday 9am-5:30pm Volunteer Income Tax Assistance (VITA) Tax Season: January 29-April 15: Monday-Friday 9am-5:30pm Decisiones De Dinero: Class time varies Email (503) 325-4547 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONSEJO HISPANO CONSEJO HISPANO TILLAMOOK ECONOMIC EMPOWERMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides Volunteer Income Tax Assistance (VITA) and help with Individual Taxpayer Identification Number (ITIN). Host financial literacy workshops for youth and their families, Decisiones De Dinero, teaching basic money management skills including earning, saving, budgeting, credit/debit, and taxes. 110 Stillwell Avenue Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Unrestricted with a focus on serving the Latinx/Hispanic Community Hours: Individual Taxpayer Identification Number (ITIN): Monday-Friday 9am-5:30pm Volunteer Income Tax Assistance (VITA) Tax Season: January 29-April 15: Monday-Friday 9am-5:30pm Decisiones De Dinero: Class time varies Email (503) 325-4547 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EL CENTRO NW ECONOMIC EMPOWERMENT AND TAX PREPARATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides Volunteer Income Tax Assistance (VITA) and helps with Individual Taxpayer Identification Number (ITIN). Also hosts financial literacy workshops for youth and their families to help make informed decisions, strengthen economic stability, and workshops for individuals who want to start a business or improve existing business. 300 S Roosevelt Drive Suite #5 Seaside, OR 97138 Eligibility: Latinx/Hispanic community members or Spanish language speakers Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5:30pm Email (971) 414-7270 Get Directions Visit Website More Details METROPOLITAN FAMILY SERVICE MFS CASH IMPUESTOS COMUNITARIOS IN PERSON TAX ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides federal and Oregon tax preparation through in-person appointments. IRS-certified volunteers prepare most individual tax returns and limited self-employment returns. Includes help with applying for or renewing an Individual Taxpayer Identification Number (ITIN) and information about available tax credits. Accepts volunteers for client facilitators, interpreters, outreach committee members, and tax preparers. 500 NW Eastman Parkway Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Focused on serving the Hispanic/Latino community and Spanish speakers Household income at or below $69,000 None of the following: Rental property, sale of cryptocurrency, or adjustments on education expenses (box 4 or 6 on 1098-T) Self employment income with any of the following: Over $50,000 in expenses, a loss for the year, employees, business use of the home, depreciation or amortization Hours: Open Wednesday-Sunday, January 24, 2026-April 15, 2026 from 7:30am-4pm Friday 9am-5pm ITIN’s Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONSEJO HISPANO ECONOMIC EMPOWERMENT CONSEJO HISPANO ECONOMIC EMPOWERMENT EL CENTRO NW ECONOMIC EMPOWERMENT AND TAX PREPARATION METROPOLITAN FAMILY SERVICE IN PERSON TAX ASSISTANCE
